info.title: UIP Smart City API
info.description: REST API for UIP Smart City Platform — Sprint 1-3

tags.name: Workflow Config
tags.description: Admin CRUD for workflow trigger configuration

tags.name: Citizen
tags.description: Citizen account registration, profile, and household management

tags.name: Citizen Utilities
tags.description: Meter management, invoices, and consumption history

tags.description: Traffic counts, incidents, and real-time congestion mapping

tags.description: User management and sensor registry (ADMIN only)

tags.name: Environment
tags.description: Sensor readings, AQI data and environmental metrics

tags.description: CRUD for alert rule configuration (ADMIN only)

tags.name: ESG
tags.description: Environmental, Social, and Governance metrics and reports

put.summary: Escalate an alert to higher authority

put.summary: Enable or disable a feature flag for a tenant

post.summary: Trigger a workflow via scenario key

post.description: Starts a new instance of the specified process with given variables

get.summary: Get traffic incidents with status filter

post.description: Simulates a sensor event. If AQI exceeds threshold, triggers Camunda BPMN aiC01_aqiCitizenAlert.

post.summary: Send a test push notification (non-production only)
Register a new citizen account and receive a JWT
Register a meter to citizen account
Refresh access token using refresh token
Logout — clear httpOnly cookie and invalidate token
Accept an invitation and set password (public endpoint)
Test trigger with sample payload — dry run, no process started

get.description: Returns paginated list of process instances filtered by status
Returns all variables for a specific process instance
Returns all deployed BPMN process definitions
Returns the BPMN XML for a specific process definition

get.summary: Vehicle counts by intersection and time window
Get congestion map as GeoJSON FeatureCollection
Get VAPID public key for client-side push subscription
List active push subscriptions for the current user

ESG summary aggregation for a given period

403.description: Missing esg:write scope or ADMIN role

get.summary: List all active sensors with online/offline status
AQI history — optionally filtered by district and period (24h/7d/30d)

parameters.description: Filter by source module (e.g. ENVIRONMENT, TRAFFIC, FLOOD, BMS)

get.summary: Recent HIGH/CRITICAL alerts for citizen notifications (last 48h)

List error records with optional module/status filters

get.description: Returns ARIMA energy forecast with 95% confidence intervals. Tenant ID extracted from JWT.

post.summary: Discover BMS devices on the local network via broadcast
Send actuator command to BMS device
post.description: Send a control command to a Building Management System device. **Requires OPERATOR role**. All commands are audit-logged.

reason.description: Audit trail reason for the command
